# Alban Dericbourg

> Freelance senior software engineer with 15 years of experience across three French unicorns (Criteo, BlaBlaCar, Mirakl). Expert in distributed systems, observability, and reliability (SLO / SRE).

Alban Dericbourg is a Paris-based freelance software engineer available for missions. He holds engineering degrees from CentraleSupélec and Arts et Métiers ParisTech, and has spent 15 years building and hardening back-end services in high-traffic distributed systems. He has strong expertise in observability, reliability engineering (SLO / SRE), technical hiring, and driving cross-team engineering projects.

Core skills: Java, Spring Boot, Distributed Systems, Kafka, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, Datadog, Prometheus, SLO, SRE, TDD, Design Docs.
